latin: Nolo! nolo! nolo! Michael audivit se Novam Eboracam non iturum esse. in terra cecidit et sicut infans clamavit: nolo! Tobias culpandus est.

glossary.nolo: I refuse, I don't want to

questions.prompt: How does Michael react to the bad news?
questions.target: He falls on the ground and screams like a baby
choices: He falls on the ground and screams like a baby

translation: No! No! No! Michael heard he was not going to New York. He fell on the ground and screamed like a baby: no! Toby is to blame.
